message:
feat(wills-estate/viz): interactive pricing calculator (hgjp.41)

PricingComparisonViz: log-scale net worth slider ($100k–$100M),
8 complexity-factor toggle chips, three-way cost comparison
(attorney / LegalZoom / jsm.md), animated savings readout.

- Attorney formula: $3k base + $0.00005/$ above $1M + $2k/chip, capped $40k
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion, keyboard accessible, aria-live outputs
- GA4 event (pricing_calc_changed) with DNT and dev-mode console fallback
- Wired via viz-error-boundary dynamic import into comparison section
- E2E test: slider interaction, chip toggling, estimate assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
